stories.title: Extreme Heat Warning for World Cup 2026
stories.desc: Researchers warn that extreme heat could pose threats to players and fans at the 2026 FIFA World Cup starting in June.

stories.title: World Cup Drives Rising Tourism Demand
stories.desc: FIFA World Cup 2026 is reshaping tourism across the US, Canada, and Mexico with rising demand and soaring hotel prices.

stories.title: Scotland Fans Turn to School Buses
stories.desc: Scottish fans are using school buses to reach games at Gillette Stadium in Massachusetts to avoid escalating public transport costs.

stories.title: Panini Launches Historic 980-Sticker Album
stories.desc: Panini officially launched the largest FIFA World Cup sticker album ever with 980 stickers at Wembley Stadium on April 28.

stories.title: Coca-Cola x Panini Stickers Launch
stories.desc: Coca-Cola partners with Panini for the first time in North America with 12 exclusive stickers hidden in specially marked bottles.

stories.title: 48-Team World Cup Biggest Album Yet
stories.desc: The 2026 Panini album features 980 unique stickers across 112 pages, marking the biggest challenge for collectors in decades.
